title: Heptapleurum zhuanum
intro: Heptapleurum zhuanum, also known as the Chinese club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, as well as its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Heptapleurum zhuanum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
